base.title: Random Thoughts & Reflections
base.excerpt: Raw reflections, unfiltered thinking, and honest musings about tech, life, and everything in between.
content: Every thought has its place. Sometimes the most random ideas spark the best conversations or creations.
This space is for raw reflections, unfiltered thinking, and honest musings about tech, life, and everything in between.

base.title: Journey Into Cybersecurity
base.excerpt: How I started my journey into cybersecurity and built a mindset around digital defense.
content: How I started my journey into cybersecurity — from curiosity about how things work to learning about network vulnerabilities, ethical hacking, and building a mindset around digital defense.

all.title: Random Thoughts & Reflections
all.excerpt: Raw reflections, unfiltered thinking, and honest musings about tech, life, and everything in between.
content: Every thought has its place. Sometimes the most random ideas spark the best conversations or creations.
This space is for raw reflections, unfiltered thinking, and honest musings about tech, life, and everything in between.

all.title: Journey Into Cybersecurity
all.excerpt: How I started my journey into cybersecurity and built a mindset around digital defense.
content: How I started my journey into cybersecurity — from curiosity about how things work to learning about network vulnerabilities, ethical hacking, and building a mindset around digital defense.

all.title: 3rd Flag Recovery
all.description: A lightweight reverse-style challenge built around a hidden note in the portfolio trail.
all.resourceDescription: Inspect the static portfolio pages and connect the encoded trail with the challenge prompt.

all.title: Network Sight
all.description: A clue trail that rewards reading carefully instead of brute forcing.
all.resourceDescription: Use the public pages, their source, and the hidden clues to identify the final flag.

all.title: Black Box Lab
all.description: A more obscure challenge meant to mimic a closed-box investigation.
all.resourceDescription: Trace the portfolio layout, inspect the static assets, and reconstruct the clue chain.
